text:
ByBen Chapman,

Published: 29/07/2024

Updated: 29/07/2024

After many viewers furiously switched off the Paris Olympics opening ceremony over its supposed depiction of Leonardo Da Vinci's 'The Last Supper' painting, we're asking whether you would consider going a step further and boycott the whole event.

Organisers have rushed to apologise over the act which GB News host Bev Turner said was "utterly depraved".

COMMENT NOW - Are you boycotting the Paris Olympics?
title: HAVE YOUR SAY - Are you boycotting the Olympics after its 'depraved' opening ceremony? COMMENT NOW
description: After many viewers furiously switched off the Paris Olympics opening ceremony over its supposed depiction of Leonardo Da Vinci's 'The Last Supper' painting, we're asking whether you would consider going a step further and boycott the whole event
